description: Feature names like 'tailscale', 'nixos', 'mac', 'linux', 'managed', 'work' are hardcoded strings scattered across modules/hosts.nix, nebula/default.nix (defaultFeatures), and nebula/helpers.nix. Renaming a feature requires finding all string occurrences. Define feature constants in a single location (e.g., a features.nix or in nebula/types.nix) and reference those constants throughout.
title: Define feature name constants to eliminate magic strings
